productDisplayName: Baggit Women Getz Taj Brown Belt
description: A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this belt from baggit is made of leatherette for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies! Made of leatherette for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in place Black copper and brown coloured belt Holes to customise fit Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
